claims: Authenticated with Cesium Ion and streamed Asset ID 96188 (OSM Buildings).
Implemented emergency coordinate fix for RTC (Relative to Center) tiles resulting in correct building placement in London.

optimization_metrics: Synchronous loading for the first 300 frames ensures log capture and coordinate stability.
